rule_adherence.notes: Links wiring respects every-layout tokens, logical properties, individual Radix packages, Portal/Viewport usage, and pure renderer-safe resolver; only the inline style block on the tooltip ghost trigger deviates from the no-inline-style rule.

simplicity.notes: Resolver and IPC additions are minimal, but the fixed-position ghost-trigger + manual getBoundingClientRect tooltip plumbing is a heavier mechanism than the simpler per-link Tooltip wrap the spec implies.

spec_compliance.notes: All acceptance criteria covered: Cmd+click vs plain click, openExternal, internal resolve+navigate, File-not-found toast, hover tooltip, Vitest resolver test, and Playwright e2e.

visual_posture.notes: Tooltip and toast styled entirely via tokens on data-state with logical properties and em radii, consistent with the design system.

violations.rule: "No inline `style` props for static styling" (docs/rules.md Styling)
violations.evidence: style={{ position: 'fixed', top: anchorRect?.top ?? 0, ... pointerEvents: 'none' }} on the tooltip ghost trigger

violations.rule: "E2E (Playwright): Cmd+click internal navigates; external triggers openExternal" (acceptance criteria)
violations.evidence: BLOCKED — BUILD CONFIG: same preload CJS issue as debounced-write.spec.ts — tests authored but may not execute under current build

summary: Spec-complete, token-clean link handling; minor inline-style use on the tooltip trigger and a flagged e2e build-config blocker keep it at concerns rather than a clean pass.
